title: leucas prostrata
intro: Leucas prostrata, also known as 'Prostrate Lantana' or 'Kasani', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Leucas prostrata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Leucas prostrata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied to the skin to treat wounds and skin conditions.
